query: Get comprehensive company profile data for the company named "AKATI SEKURITY". The company's official website domain is akati.com — use this for disambiguation and to ensure you are searching for the correct company. Gather information from LinkedIn, G2, Reddit, and other reliable sources. Include company details, reviews, industry codes (UNSPSC, NAICS, ISIC), and market sentiment.
answer:
**Executive Summary**
AKATI Sekurity is a Kuala Lumpur-headquartered Managed Security Service Provider (MSSP) and cybersecurity consultancy established in 2007, generating an estimated $21.5 million to $27 million in annual revenue. Operating as a self-described "Cybersecurity SWAT Team," the firm leverages artificial intelligence and advanced digital forensics to serve a global client base, maintaining a flawless 5.0 rating across major B2B review platforms and securing prominent industry awards through 2025 and 2026.

**Key Findings**

**Corporate Profile and Leadership**
Founded in 2007, AKATI Sekurity is headquartered at 21, Jalan Pinang, 50450 in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, and maintains a presence across five continents [AKATI Sekurity Named 2025 AI MSP of the Year at Channel Futures MSP 501 Gala](https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2025/10/03/3161076/0/en/AKATI-Sekurity-Named-2025-AI-MSP-of-the-Year-at-Channel-Futures-MSP-501-Gala.html); [AKATI Sekurity Information | SignalHire Company Profile](https://www.signalhire.com/companies/akati-consulting); [AKATI Sekurity | LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/akatisekurity). The company's name, "AKATI," is an informal reference to the phrase "always striving ahead" [AKATI Sekurity Security Consulting Services, Worldwide Reviews & Ratings 2026 | Gartner Peer Insights](https://www.gartner.com/reviews/product/akati-sekurity-security-consulting-services-worldwide). 

The executive team is led by Group CEO Krishna Rajagopal, supported by General Manager Santiago Monterrosa, Global Sales Director Aniket Bhirud, Sales Director Deven Lachake, and Noraisyah N. in Management [Krishna Rajagopal | CEO - AKATI Sekurity | Forbes Technology Council](https://councils.forbes.com/profile/Krishna-Rajagopal-CEO-AKATI-Sekurity/f74249cb-ca65-4ae9-926e-e5023956f4fb); [AKATI Sekurity Information | SignalHire Company Profile](https://www.signalhire.com/companies/akati-consulting). 

Estimates of the company's size vary across intelligence platforms:
*   **Revenue:** SignalHire estimates annual revenue at approximately $27 million, while RocketReach projects $21.5 million for the year 2026 [AKATI Sekurity Information | SignalHire Company Profile](https://www.signalhire.com/companies/akati-consulting); [AKATI Sekurity Management Team | Org Chart](https://rocketreach.co/akati-sekurity-management_b5d132def42e428f).
*   **Headcount:** Global employee counts are reported between 51 and 200 personnel, with RocketReach specifically citing 55 employees [AKATI Sekurity Company Overview | NodeFlair](https://nodeflair.com/companies/akati-sekurity); [AKATI Sekurity Management Team | Org Chart](https://rocketreach.co/akati-sekurity-management_b5d132def42e428f). The company exhibits strong employee retention, with 20% of the workforce maintaining a tenure of over 11 years, and 27% staying for 5 to 7 years [AKATI Sekurity Information | SignalHire Company Profile](https://www.signalhire.com/companies/akati-consulting).
*   **Client Base:** The firm reports serving between 300 and over 500 global clients, depending on the source and publication date [AKATI Sekurity Named 2025 AI MSP of the Year at Channel Futures MSP 501 Gala](https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2025/10/03/3161076/0/en/AKATI-Sekurity-Named-2025-AI-MSP-of-the-Year-at-Channel-Futures-MSP-501-Gala.html); [People — AKATI Sekurity | Cybersecurity SWAT Team](https://www.akati.com/people).

**Core Capabilities and Technology**
AKATI Sekurity provides comprehensive defensive cyberspace operations, including Computer Forensics, Risk Management, Security Posture Assessment, Vulnerability Assessment, Architecture Security Review, Security Source Code Review, and a "Rent a CISO" program [AKATI Sekurity Information | SignalHire Company Profile](https://www.signalhire.com/companies/akati-consulting). 

Advanced technical offerings include:
*   **Offensive/Defensive Testing:** DDoS testing, Social Engineering tests, Red Team and Purple Team exercises, and Threat Hunting [AKATI Sekurity Information | SignalHire Company Profile](https://www.signalhire.com/companies/akati-consulting).
*   **AI Integration:** The firm utilizes Artificial Intelligence for behavioral analysis to detect network deviations and Natural Language Processing (NLP) for advanced phishing detection [AKATI Sekurity: AI integration in cybersecurity | LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/akatisekurity_gaining-an-edge-using-ai-to-thwart-cybercriminals-activity-7119897011226615808-PnUJ).
*   **Managed XDR:** Implementation of the Stellar Cyber Open XDR platform has reportedly improved analyst effectiveness and threat detection for their customers [AKATI Sekurity supercharges its threat detection and ... - V2Catalog](https://v2catalog.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/01-23-Casestudy_Akati-Sekurity_v2.pdf).
*   **Compliance & Training:** AKATI is an official ISC2 training provider for CISSP certification and a qualified auditor for Malaysia's National Critical Information Infrastructure (NCII) cybersecurity compliance under Act 854 and Direction No. 8 [AKATI Sekurity on LinkedIn: Creating a Culture of Cybersecurity](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/akatisekurity_creating-a-culture-of-cybersecurity-making-activity-7092732207747772416-b5MW); [NCII Cybersecurity Compliance — AKATI Sekurity | Cybersecurity SWAT Team](https://www.akati.com/ncii-cybersecurity-compliance).

**Industry Classification Codes**
AKATI Sekurity's service portfolio maps to the following standardized industry codes:
*   **NAICS Codes:** 
    *   541512 (Computer Systems Design Services) for consulting, network design, and risk assessments.
    *   541513 (Computer Facilities Management Services) for 24x7x365 Security Operations Centre (SOC) monitoring.
    *   541519 (Other Computer Related Services) for digital forensics, incident response, and vulnerability assessments.
    *   541611 (Administrative Management and General Management Consulting Services) for GRC and regulatory compliance (PCI DSS, NCII Act 854).
    *   541690 (Other Scientific and Technical Consulting Services) for specialized security consulting [Cyber Security NAICS Code: A Complete Guide for Businesses and Startups - Tech World](https://novustechworld.com/cyber-security-naics-code); [NAICS Code for Cybersecurity: Everything You Need to Know - Tolu Michael](https://tolumichael.com/naics-code-for-cybersecurity/); [541690 - Other Scientific and Technical Consulting Services](https://www.naics.com/naics-code-description/?code=541690).
*   **SIC Codes:** 7373 (Computer-integrated systems design), 7379 (Computer Related Services, NEC for forensics/IR), and 8742 (Management Consulting Services) [SEC.gov | Standard Industrial Classification (SIC) Code List](https://www.sec.gov/search-filings/standard-industrial-classification-sic-code-list).
*   **UNSPSC Code:** 81111800 (System and system component administration services) [UNSPSC Codes Class: 81111800 - UNSPSC Codes | United States Datasets](https://usa.databasesets.com/unspsc/class/81111800).

**Analysis / Risk Assessment**

**Market Sentiment and B2B Reviews**
Market sentiment for AKATI Sekurity is overwhelmingly positive. On Clutch, the company holds a 5.0 rating across 7 verified reviews with a 100% positive feedback rate [AKATI Sekurity Reviews (7), Pricing, Services & ...](https://clutch.co/profile/akati-sekurity); [Top Cybersecurity Consulting Companies in Malaysia - May 2026 Rankings | Clutch.co](https://clutch.co/my/it-services/cybersecurity). Clients consistently praise the firm's proactive risk anticipation and strategic alignment. One healthcare CEO noted: "Instead of just reacting to threats, they consistently anticipated potential risks and provided strategic recommendations" [Top Cybersecurity Consulting Companies in Malaysia - May 2026 Rankings | Clutch.co](https://clutch.co/my/it-services/cybersecurity). 

The firm has achieved significant industry recognition, including:
*   Named the 2025 AI MSP of the Year at the Channel Futures MSP 501 Gala and ranked as the 6th best MSSP globally [AKATI Sekurity Named 2025 AI MSP of the Year at Channel Futures MSP 501 Gala](https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2025/10/03/3161076/0/en/AKATI-Sekurity-Named-2025-AI-MSP-of-the-Year-at-Channel-Futures-MSP-501-Gala.html).
*   Honored with The BrandLaureate 20th Anniversary Special Limited Edition Best Brands Award 2025 as the "Most Preferred Brand – Trusted Cybersecurity Company" [AKATI Sekurity Receives BrandLaureate Award 2025 for Trusted Cybersecurity Excellence — AKATI Sekurity | Cybersecurity SWAT Team](https://www.akati.com/insights-blog/akati-sekurity-receives-brandlaureate-award-2025-for-trusted-cybersecurity-excellence).
*   Featured in the Gartner Market Guide for Digital Forensics and Incident Response Retainer Services [AKATI Sekurity Receives BrandLaureate Award 2025 for Trusted Cybersecurity Excellence — AKATI Sekurity | Cybersecurity SWAT Team](https://www.akati.com/insights-blog/akati-sekurity-receives-brandlaureate-award-2025-for-trusted-cybersecurity-excellence).
*   Received the 2024 Asia-Pacific Competitive Strategy Leadership Award from Frost & Sullivan [AKATI Consulting Group - Overview, News & Similar companies | ZoomInfo.com](https://www.zoominfo.com/c/akati-consulting-group/350871866).

**Employee Sentiment and Culture**
AKATI Sekurity publicly emphasizes a "people first" mindset over profitability and commits to an environment free from harassment, celebrating diversity [AKATI Sekurity Digital Forensics and Incident Response Retainer Services Reviews | Gartner Peer Insights](https://www.gartner.com/reviews/market/digital-forensics-incident-response-services/vendor/akati-sekurity/product/akati-sekurity-digital-forensics-and-incident-response-services); [Working at AKATI Sekurity company profile and information | JobStreet.com Malaysia](https://www.jobstreet.com.my/en/companies/997144-akati-consulting-m). Employee reviews reflect high satisfaction, with 5.0 ratings on JobStreet Malaysia (4 reviews, 100% rating salary as high or average), AmbitionBox (1 review), and Glassdoor [Reviews AKATI Sekurity employee ratings and reviews | JobStreet](https://www.jobstreet.com.my/en/companies/997144-akati-sekurity/reviews); [Life at AKATI Sekurity: Culture, Salary, Reviews, Interviews & more](https://www.ambitionbox.com/overview/akati-sekurity-overview); [AKATI Sekurity Company Overview | NodeFlair](https://nodeflair.com/companies/akati-sekurity). However, one Glassdoor review titled "Not much growth" suggests potential limitations in upward mobility for some roles [AKATI Sekurity - Not much growth](https://www.glassdoor.com/Reviews/Employee-Review-AKATI-Sekurity-RVW75461871.htm). As of the latest data, the company has no active job openings listed on JobStreet [AKATI Sekurity job openings and vacancies | JobStreet](https://www.jobstreet.com.my/en/companies/997144-akati-sekurity/jobs).

**Gaps and Limitations**
*   **ISIC Codes:** The research findings did not contain data mapping the company's services to the International Standard Industrial Classification (ISIC) system.
*   **Data Discrepancies:** There are conflicting reports regarding the company's exact employee headcount (ranging from 55 to 200), annual revenue ($21.5M vs. $27M), and total client count (300 vs. 500+).
*   **Negative Sentiment:** Due to the overwhelmingly positive B2B ratings and limited volume of employee reviews (e.g., only 4 on JobStreet and 1 on AmbitionBox), a comprehensive assessment of operational weaknesses or negative market sentiment could not be fully established.
